task: I wrote a rough note for my teacher about a change in my school day, but it needs to be cleaned up before I send it. Can you help me make it sound clear and school-appropriate?

turns.agent_response: Absolutely — paste the note here, and I’ll help you rewrite it so it sounds clear, polite, and school-appropriate.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah. Here it is:

Hi Ms. Carter,
My schedule got messed up because I had to leave early for an appointment, so I missed part of math and I wasn’t sure what homework to do. Can you let me know what I need to make up? I’ll get it done as soon as I can.

Thanks,
Evan

turns.agent_response:
Of course — here’s a cleaner, school-appropriate version:

Hi Ms. Carter,

My schedule was changed because I had to leave early for an appointment, so I missed part of math class and wasn’t sure which homework I need to complete. Could you please let me know what I should make up? I’ll finish it as soon as possible.

Thank you,  
Evan

If you want, I can also make it sound a little more formal or a little more casual.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Clear and not weird about it.
